description_long: This object consists of two large, pink-capped mushrooms with thick, pale blue stems, growing from a patch of green grass. The mushroom caps are broad and slightly domed, with a subtle, swirling pattern on their surfaces. Two brown-shelled snails are present: one is perched atop the taller mushroom cap, while the other is on the ground nearby, facing the first. The mushrooms have a natural, organic appearance, with the caps showing gentle curves and the stems appearing sturdy and slightly textured. The scene is set on a roughly circular patch of grass, giving the impression of a small, lively ecosystem. The overall look is whimsical and slightly stylized, suitable for a park or garden in an urban environment.
description: Two pink-capped mushrooms with blue stems grow from a grassy patch, accompanied by two brown-shelled snails, one on a cap and one on the ground.
description_view_0: Front view showing the taller mushroom with a snail on top and another snail on the grass, both mushrooms visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height difference between the two mushrooms and the interaction between the snails.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the mushrooms, with the snails less visible and the cap patterns more prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the snails facing each other, with the larger mushroom cap dominating the scene.
